title: When using pandas.merge or pandas.join, the parameters 'how' and 'validate' should be provided
description: This rule checks that the 'how' and 'validate' parameters are provided when using pandas.merge or pandas.join. These parameters are essential for specifying the join operation and validating the resulting DataFrame.
message: The 'how' and 'validate' parameters are missing in the given pandas.merge or pandas.join operation.
recommendation: Always provide 'how' and 'validate' parameters when using pandas.merge or pandas.join.
why_is_this_an_issue: Missing 'how' and 'validate' parameters can lead to unexpected results and errors during data analysis.
how_to_fix: Always provide 'how' and 'validate' parameters when using pandas.merge or pandas.join.
